understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character on a tile grid to reach the goal gem tile (+) within the turn/attempt limits, avoiding hazards like spikes (u/v) that cause an immediate loss when landed on.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal action (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT) to shift one column, then gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile (o/m/w), hitting a hazard (u/v), or reaching the goal (+). CLICK targets a specific clickable tile (e.g., a breakable block x) at a given [x, y] to remove it and open/alter fall paths; clicking does not move the player. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from mistakes. Effective play relies on using the landing previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) to pick moves that lead to safe landings and useful vertical passages, and using clicks to remove blocks that obstruct progress in the gravity direction.
